channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Inside The Cruise Ship At The Centre Of A Rare Hantavirus Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Two of the cases - a woman who died and the evacuated man - tested positive for hantavirus

item.description: A cruise ship off West Africa faces a hantavirus outbreak with three deaths and passengers isolating amid health monitoring.
item.content:encoded: A cruise ship off West Africa faces a hantavirus outbreak with three deaths and passengers isolating amid health monitoring.

item.title: Two Disease Specialists Heading To Hantavirus Cruise Boat: Operator
item.description: Two specialist doctors in infectious diseases are heading from the Netherlands to the MV Hondius ship that has seen a deadly outbreak of hantavirus...
item.content:encoded: Two specialist doctors in infectious diseases are heading from the Netherlands to the MV Hondius ship that has seen a deadly outbreak of hantavirus...

item.title: WHO Tracing Over 80 People Taken By Hantavirus Victim
item.description: The World Health Organization said Tuesday it was tracing people on a flight between the island of Saint Helena and Johannesburg, taken by a cruise...
item.content:encoded: The World Health Organization said Tuesday it was tracing people on a flight between the island of Saint Helena and Johannesburg, taken by a cruise...

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: How Cruise Ship Cases Went Undetected For Weeks
item.description: A deadly outbreak of the rare hantavirus unfolded over the course of weeks on a cruise ship that sailed from Argentina toward Antarctica.
item.content:encoded: A deadly outbreak of the rare hantavirus unfolded over the course of weeks on a cruise ship that sailed from Argentina toward Antarctica.

item.title: Hazmat Suits On, Health Authorities Evacuate Suspected Hantavirus Patients From Cruise Ship

media:content.media:description: The WHO chief, Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, posted images of the evacuations

item.description: Medical teams in hazmat suits evacuated suspected hantavirus patients from cruise ship MV Hondius as WHO-led containment measures intensified. The rare Andes virus outbreak has triggered isolation, air ambulance transfers and international surveillan
item.content:encoded: Medical teams in hazmat suits evacuated suspected hantavirus patients from cruise ship MV Hondius as WHO-led containment measures intensified. The rare Andes virus outbreak has triggered isolation, air ambulance transfers and international surveillan

item.title: Senior Hezbollah Commander Killed In Israeli Strike On Beirut

media:content.media:description: The strike hit a meeting of Radwan leaders in Ghobeiri, a Hezbollah stronghold (Representational).

item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said his military had targeted "the commander of Hezbollah's Radwan force".
item.content:encoded: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said his military had targeted "the commander of Hezbollah's Radwan force".

item.title: Hantavirus Has 38 Strains, Only 1 Spreads To Humans: New Updates In Atlantic Cruise Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Atlantic cruise outbreak where one hantavirus strain is recorded to transmit from human to human

item.description: An update on the Atlantic cruise outbreak, explaining hantavirus strains and why only one is known to spread to humans. Here is what you need to know about the different strains and if you should be worried.
item.content:encoded: An update on the Atlantic cruise outbreak, explaining hantavirus strains and why only one is known to spread to humans. Here is what you need to know about the different strains and if you should be worried.

item.title: "War Criminal": Pro-Kremlin Lawyer Who Helped Jail Alexei Navalny Turns Against Putin
item.description: Former Kremlin-linked lawyer and propagandist Ilya Remeslo was detained in March after he posted online that Vladimir Putin should resign.
item.content:encoded: Former Kremlin-linked lawyer and propagandist Ilya Remeslo was detained in March after he posted online that Vladimir Putin should resign.

item.title: CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies At 87. How His Vision Of News Changed Industry

media:content.media:description: Turner supported endangered species programmes including black-footed ferrets and tortoises (File Photo).

item.description: The media mogul Ted Turner's death on Wednesday leaves a legacy of conservation work that spanned decades.
item.content:encoded: The media mogul Ted Turner's death on Wednesday leaves a legacy of conservation work that spanned decades.

item.title: "Watcha Want Me To Do? Bust Out Crying": Epstein Note Before Suicide Attempt

media:content.media:description: Tartaglione claimed he discovered the note in a book after Epstein was found on the floor of their cell

item.description: Few people had known about the note until Epstein's former cellmate, Nicholas Tartaglione, a former police officer serving a life sentence for killing four people, mentioned it last year on writer Jessica Reed Kraus' podcast.
item.content:encoded: Few people had known about the note until Epstein's former cellmate, Nicholas Tartaglione, a former police officer serving a life sentence for killing four people, mentioned it last year on writer Jessica Reed Kraus' podcast.

item.title: From Rodents To Humans: How Hantavirus Usually Travels In Closed Spaces

media:content.media:description: Cruise ship's Hantavirus outbreak: How it travels from rodents to humans

item.description: Hantavirus is a group of viruses that can travel in enclosed spaces. Here is what you need to know about hantavirus and how it can infect humans.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus is a group of viruses that can travel in enclosed spaces. Here is what you need to know about hantavirus and how it can infect humans.

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Deal 'Very Possible' As Two Sides Discuss 14-Point Meko
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.

item.title: One Page, 14 Points: Inside The US-Iran 'Memo' To End Middle East War

media:content.media:description: Trump has said that if "Iran agrees to give what has been agreed to," the war would be over

item.description: The memo calls on Iran to commit to a moratorium on nuclear enrichment, the US agreeing to lift its sanctions and release billions in frozen Iranian funds, and both sides lifting restrictions around transit through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The memo calls on Iran to commit to a moratorium on nuclear enrichment, the US agreeing to lift its sanctions and release billions in frozen Iranian funds, and both sides lifting restrictions around transit through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: US President Trump's Renewed Trade War With China

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping this month.

item.description: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping in May on his first visit to China in eight years.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping in May on his first visit to China in eight years.

item.title: Trump Official Lutnick Testifies On Epstein Island Lunch

media:content.media:description: Howard Lutnick had lunch with the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.description: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick told members of a congressional committee in private testimony on Wednesday that he couldn't recall why he and his family had lunch on Jeffrey Epstein's private island, members said.
item.content:encoded: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick told members of a congressional committee in private testimony on Wednesday that he couldn't recall why he and his family had lunch on Jeffrey Epstein's private island, members said.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Deal "Very Possible" Following Latest Talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday told reporters that the U.S. has had very good talks with Iran in the last 24 hours.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday told reporters that the U.S. has had very good talks with Iran in the last 24 hours.

item.title: China Rolls Out J-35AE Stealth Jet As F-35 Rival, Pak May Be First Buyer

media:content.media:description: The export-focused J-35AE is expected to mirror the domestic version in performance

item.description: The aircraft carried the branding of the Aviation Industry Corporation of China instead of air force markings, signalling its export role.
item.content:encoded: The aircraft carried the branding of the Aviation Industry Corporation of China instead of air force markings, signalling its export role.

item.title: Patient Who Died Of Hantavirus Was 'Briefly' On International Flight

media:content.media:description: The person was removed before take-off.

item.description: Dutch health authorities are contacting those who were aboard this flight "as a precaution," KLM said in its statement.
item.content:encoded: Dutch health authorities are contacting those who were aboard this flight "as a precaution," KLM said in its statement.

item.title: Epstein Had Dirt On 'One Person', No Links To CIA Or Mossad: Former Lawyer

media:content.media:description: Dershowitz said that he regrets defending Epstein

item.description: Speaking to Pod Force One, a political podcast hosted by New York Post columnist and author Miranda Devine, Jeffrey Epstein's former lawyer Alan Dershowitz said that he was not a paedophile but was only interested in 16- to 18-year-olds.
item.content:encoded: Speaking to Pod Force One, a political podcast hosted by New York Post columnist and author Miranda Devine, Jeffrey Epstein's former lawyer Alan Dershowitz said that he was not a paedophile but was only interested in 16- to 18-year-olds.

item.title: CNN Founder And TV News Trailblazer Ted Turner Dies At 87

media:content.media:description: CNN launched in 1980 as the first 24-hour cable news network.

item.description: A brash risk taker, Turner helped reshape the television industry in the late 20th century.
item.content:encoded: A brash risk taker, Turner helped reshape the television industry in the late 20th century.
